mapper.sql: id, menu_name, parent_id, ancestors, menu_type, path, component, perms, icon, is_frame, is_cache, sort, visible, status, description
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT FROM sys_menu_info WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_menu_info WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu_info ( id, menu_name, parent_id, ancestors, menu_type, path, component, perms, icon, is_frame, is_cache, sort, visible, status, description, create_by, create_org, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{menuName}, #{parentId}, #{ancestors}, #{menuType}, #{path}, #{component}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{isFrame}, #{isCache}, #{sort}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createBy}, #{createOrg}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu_info SET menu_name = #{menuName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, ancestors = #{ancestors}, menu_type = #{menuType}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, perms = #{perms}, icon = #{icon}, is_frame = #{isFrame}, is_cache = #{isCache}, sort = #{sort}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
